title: Deadline Mode for Multiple Items
excerpt: For a group of items in a table, If there are alot of items, it would be nice to utilize deadline mode to set one deadline for all the items without having to change each item deadline individually

posts.author: hhouse (Hannah House)
posts.cookedHtml: For a group of items in a table, If there are alot of items, it would be nice to utilize deadline mode to set one deadline for all the items without having to change each item deadline individually

posts.author: shannon-cxmonday (Shannon Thao)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Hannah! Welcome to the monday Community! Thanks for submitting your feature request.

What you’re looking for is currently possible with batch actions! If you select the top checkbox for a group on your board, this will batch select all of the items in the group. If you’re looking to batch select a particular set of items, you can click the checkbox for one of the items, hold your shift key, then select the checkbox for the final item.

Screenshot 2025-07-16 at 10.28.53 AM1558×559 75.8 KB

From there, select the 3-dot icon for your Date Column to select “Set as a deadline.” This will apply the deadline mode feature for all of the selected items, like so:

image1598×195 24.8 KB

I hope this helps!
